Add & Drop Classes

‘mt . U = \

After an initial registration, students may make changes to their schedule by adding or dropping classes on Testudo at app. testudo.umd.edu/main/dropAdd. A student’s permanent record and student account may be impacted by the timing of these changes. See below for information about the Schedule Adjustment Period, Drop Period, and Refund Schedules for Drops. Students are responsible for checking the calendar that corresponds to their semester, term, or non-standard course for exact dates and deadlines at registrar.umd. edu/calendars.
